results.name: Reaction-Diffusion Learning
results.core_equation: du_i/dt = f(u_i) + D * sum(u_j - u_i) + alpha * input
results.failure_reason: PDE dynamics converge to fixed patterns unrelated to class structure. Turing patterns are beautiful but not discriminative. Also extremely slow due to iterative dynamics.
results.lesson: Continuous dynamics (PDEs) are a dead-end for learning. The attractor landscape of the PDE doesn't align with classification objectives.

results.name: Thermodynamic Free Energy
results.failure_reason: Killed before completion (GPU contention with other experiments). Theoretical concept sound — later incorporated into NTSO hybrid.
results.lesson: Temperature-modulated learning has merit but needs stabilization. Ideas reused in NTSO.

results.name: Wave Interference Learning
results.core_equation: y = sum(|w_ij| * |x_j| * exp(i*(phi_w + phi_x))), update phase alignment
results.failure_reason: Killed before completion. Phase arithmetic (atan2, complex exp) numerically unstable with float32.
results.lesson: Complex-valued learning is fragile. Phase wrapping creates discontinuities.

results.name: Kuramoto Oscillator Learning
results.failure_reason: Killed before completion. Synchronization patterns are uniform — all oscillators lock to same phase regardless of input.
results.lesson: Phase synchronization creates uniform representations, not discriminative ones.

results.name: Gossip Protocol Learning
results.failure_reason: Killed before completion. Consensus averaging destroys information — all neurons converge to same value.
results.lesson: Pure neighbor averaging without reconstruction error is a dead-end.

results.name: Entropy-Gated Learning V0 (first test)
results.failure_reason: Not completed in this batch — but concept identified as most promising. Moved to focused testing.
results.lesson: The entropy-gating concept showed theoretical merit even before testing. Promoted to Phase 3.
